differences.title: 1. RENDERING STRATEGY
differences.leftDesc: Hydrates minimal JS per component, ship less code by default.
differences.rightDesc: Flexible rendering options for diverse application needs.

differences.title: 2. PERFORMANCE
differences.leftDesc: Zero JS shipped to the client by default for ultimate speed.
differences.rightDesc: Code splitting and optimization for efficient delivery.

differences.title: 3. INTEGRATIONS
differences.leftDesc: Use multiple UI frameworks (React, Vue, Svelte) in the same project.
differences.rightDesc: Primarily built around React, strong ecosystem.

differences.title: 4. DEVELOPMENT EXPERIENCE
differences.leftDesc: Easier to learn and get started, especially for static sites.
differences.rightDesc: Robust features for complex applications, API routes.

differences.title: 5. USE CASES
differences.leftDesc: Ideal for blogs, marketing sites, documentation, portfolios.
differences.rightDesc: Suitable for dynamic dashboards, e-commerce, SaaS.

differences.title: 6. API ROUTES
differences.leftDesc: Focuses on frontend, requires separate backend for complex APIs.
differences.rightDesc: Integrated API routes for building backend logic.

differences.title: 7. COMMUNITY & ECOSYSTEM
differences.leftDesc: Rapidly expanding community and feature set.
differences.rightDesc: Vast resources, extensive community support, established.
